app.name: Rust Token Killer (rtk)
app.one_liner: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands.

screens.name: Token Optimization Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display real-time token savings and command optimization status.

rust_commands.name: rtk_gain
rust_commands.purpose: Display token savings statistics for current or specified project.

rust_commands.name: rtk_git_commit
rust_commands.purpose: Optimize git commit output for LLM context.

rust_commands.name: rtk_init
rust_commands.purpose: Launch interactive config wizard to set up rtk for a project.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add support for git, grep, and docker commands
week 1: Implement core command proxying with output filtering
week 1: Integrate token savings tracking per project
acceptance_tests: AWS CLI and psql commands produce token-optimized output as of v0.24.0.
Executing `rtk git commit -am message` succeeds without error and optimizes output.
Interactive config wizard launches via `rtk init` and saves settings correctly.
Running `rtk gain` displays token savings stats and confirms correct installation.
